title: leucanthemum vulgare subsp. pujiulae
intro: Leucanthemum vulgare subsp. pujiulae, commonly known as the oxeye daisy, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Leucanthemum vulgare subsp. pujiulae include its ability to promote skin health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Leucanthemum vulgare subsp. pujiulae can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and topical ointments, which can be used to support skin health and well-being.
